  <a href="mailto:housset.thomas@pm.me"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Email-0D1117?style=for-the-badge&logo=protonmail&logoColor=6D4AFF" alt="Email" /></a>
</p>

---

Security consultant and builder, based in Paris. By day I advise enterprise clients on cloud security and AI governance. The rest of the time I build things, OSINT platforms, AI agents, research tooling.

Previously Deputy CISO at Mercedes-Benz. Currently at Advens, researching sovereign AI governance.

### Building

| Project | What it is |
|---|---|
| [**acquis.app**](https://acquis.app) | OSINT platform for M&A cyber due diligence |
| [**research.thomas.how**](https://research.thomas.how) | Research hub: thesis, projects, certifications, notes |
| [**WayTrace**](https://github.com/HXLLO/WayTrace) | Wayback Machine intelligence toolkit |
| [**RegulAIte**](https://github.com/HXLLO/RegulAIte) | Multi-agent RAG for cyber regulation |
| [**FishSentinel**](https://github.com/HXLLO/FishSentinel) | Phishing simulation framework |

### Stack
